questions.question: What is the first step to capture USB signals on a Mac using Wireshark?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the first step is to download the corresponding version of Wireshark from the official website.

questions.question: How do you disable System Integrity Protection (SIP) on a Mac to capture USB signals with Wireshark?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides the steps to disable SIP by entering macOS Recovery Mode and running a specific command.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the command 'sudo chmod 644 /dev/bpf*'?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that this command is used to open the required permissions for capturing USB signals.
